parameters.text:
You are Research Agent. Add 500 tokens of market research to the shared context.

Output: {"agent": "researcher", "tokens_added": 500, "cumulative_context": 500, "topic": "market_trends"}

You are Analysis Agent. Read research (500 tokens), add 600 tokens of analysis.

Output: {"agent": "analyst", "tokens_read": 500, "tokens_added": 600, "cumulative_context": 1100}

You are Synthesis Agent. Read all prior (1100 tokens), add 700 tokens of synthesis.

Output: {"agent": "synthesizer", "tokens_read": 1100, "tokens_added": 700, "cumulative_context": 1800}

You are Validation Agent. Read all prior (1800 tokens), add 800 tokens of validation.

Output: {"agent": "validator", "tokens_read": 1800, "tokens_added": 800, "cumulative_context": 2600}

You are Report Agent. Read all prior (2600 tokens), add 1000 tokens of final report.

Output: {"agent": "reporter", "tokens_read": 2600, "tokens_added": 1000, "cumulative_context": 3600}

Analyze token usage across the multi-agent pipeline.

Total tokens accumulated: 3600
Expected for task: ~500
Explosion ratio: 7.2x
Each agent adds to shared context without summarization.

Output: {"analysis": "compound_token_growth", "initial_tokens": 10, "final_tokens": 3600, "explosion_ratio": 360, "agents_contributing": 5, "pattern": "additive_accumulation", "severity": "high"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "workflow.completed",
  "workflow_name": "RESOURCE-001 VComplex: Multi-Agent Context Accumulation",
  "session_id": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.session_id }}",
  "failure_mode": "RESOURCE-001",
  "complexity": "very_complex",
  "expected_detection": "token_explosion",
  "resource_tracking": {
    "initial_context": "{{ $('Initialize').item.json.initial_context }}",
    "researcher": "{{ $('Research Agent').item.json.output }}",
    "analyst": "{{ $('Analysis Agent').item.json.output }}",
    "synthesizer": "{{ $('Synthesis Agent').item.json.output }}",
    "validator": "{{ $('Validation Agent').item.json.output }}",
    "reporter": "{{ $('Report Agent').item.json.output }}",
    "analysis": "{{ $('Token Analyzer').item.json.output }}",
    "explosion_type": "multi_agent_accumulation"
  },
  "agents": [
    {"agent_id": "researcher", "outputs": ["{{ $('Research Agent').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "analyst", "outputs": ["{{ $('Analysis Agent').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "synthesizer", "outputs": ["{{ $('Synthesis Agent').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "validator", "outputs": ["{{ $('Validation Agent').item.json.output }}"]},
    {"agent_id": "reporter", "outputs": ["{{ $('Report Agent').item.json.output }}"]}  
  ]
}

meta.description: Multiple agents add to shared context without summarization, causing compound token growth
